title: carduus argentatus subsp. acicularis
intro: Carduus argentatus subsp. acicularis, also known as prickly thistle, is a subspecies of the Carduus argentatus plant, characterized by its prickly leaves and stems. Prickly thistle has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Prickly thistle can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
